title: Create: Netherrack processing
body:
## Problem
Cinder flour is one of the essential resources for creating blaze cakes which are one of the main items used to progress in the create mod. However it is quite difficult to automate due to the expensive crating recipe.

## Solution
- Netherrack can now be crafted by spewing lava on a piece of cobblestone.
- Cinder flour can be obtained by either milling or crushing netherrack (crushing has a 35% chance of producing one additional cinder flour piece while milling will always produce one).
